{{Infobox concept
| name = Children of Nakothi
| introduced = ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow
}}

''See also: [[Children of Nakothi Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Children]] of [[Nakothi]] are monstrous entities created from human remains through the power of the [[Great Elder]] known as [[Nakothi]], or the [[Dead Mother]]. These creatures are formed when her power embeds itself in corpses, effectively warping human bodies into specialized, grotesque forms. While [[Nakothi]] originally designed them to serve as perfect workers during her reign, they are now characterized by a mindless, insatiable hunger and a lack of wisdom. They often appear as mismatched masses of organs, flesh, and bone, sometimes possessing features like tentacles or shifting, pulpy heads. These beings are driven by a primal bloodlust and can be summoned to battle by the [[Handmaiden]]. They are capable of swarming in massive numbers, covering entire landscapes or filling arenas to overwhelm their targets. Despite their terrifying and unnatural appearance, they are considered mindless minions that can be fought by those with sufficient strength or invested weaponry. Their presence is often associated with the stench of death and a sense of profound hunger.}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Children]] of [[Nakothi]] are a group of [[Elderspawn]] stitched together from human corpses that [[Calder]] finds largely unfamiliar. Driven by a mindless hunger, these entities seek to force the living into a deadly remaking. They have been observed swimming around the [[Aion]] and have launched attacks against the camp located on the [[island]]. Guided by the call of their [[Handmaiden]], the group is summoned to battle by her command.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Children of Nakothi]] have been attacking the camp on the [[island]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c11">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Children of Nakothi]] are a group surrounding [[Tristania]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c12">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Children of Nakothi]] are a group that [[Calder]] is not very familiar with.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Children of Nakothi]] crave to introduce the living to a deadly remaking.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Children of Nakothi]] are called to battle by their [[Handmaiden]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c23">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Children of Nakothi]] are [[Elderspawn]] stitched and blended together from the corpses of men.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c25">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Children of Nakothi]] are guided by the call of the [[Handmaiden]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c27">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Children of Nakothi]] possess a mindless hunger.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c27" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Children of Nakothi]] have been spotted swimming around the [[Aion]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c28">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 28</ref>}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Children]] of [[Nakothi]] are deformed shapes formed when the power of [[Nakothi]] embeds itself into human remains. These creatures, often composed of various human parts, were created from ancient bodies by the [[Heart]]. During a fight, they arrived to stream around [[Naberius]] and eventually gathered in the crater surrounding the [[arena]] to launch an attack. As they swarmed around the [[Handmaiden]], [[Meia]] intervened to rescue the [[Watchmen]] from their grasp, even as it was signaled that more were coming.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Children of Nakothi]] are creatures born when [[Nakothi]]’s power embeds itself in human remains.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c11">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Children of Nakothi]] stream around [[Naberius]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Children of Nakothi]] are deformed shapes shared by the dead.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c15">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Ancient bodies were turned into [[Children of Nakothi]] by the [[Heart]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Children of Nakothi]] are often made out of human parts.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c21">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Children of Nakothi]] arrived during the fight.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Children of Nakothi]] are coming.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c23">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Children of Nakothi]] swarm around the [[Handmaiden]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c25">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Children of Nakothi]] gathered in the crater around the [[arena]] to attack.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Meia]] rescued [[Watchmen]] from the [[Children of Nakothi]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c27">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|When the [[Children of Nakothi]] take a city, it is defiled.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c13">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Children of Nakothi]] are enemies [[Shera]] has fought face-to-face.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c5">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Children of Nakothi]] can be fought by a man with an invested [[sword]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c18">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|“Ever since we set up camp on this island, we’ve been under constant attack from the Children of Nakothi.”<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c11" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire concepts]]
[[Category:Lifeforms]]
